phase-plan.purpose: Implement chat-proposed, user-applied mutations for model definitions, stats/features, and content schema entities with validation feedback in Space Explorer.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: structured operation contract, chat UI apply flow, mutation engine. Out of scope: release sign-off and manual QA closure.

task.description: Add structured operation payload schema to chat API route.
Add operation preview + explicit apply action to chat UI.
Implement Space Explorer operation executor with schema validation feedback.

dod.criterion: Chat can propose typed operations for model/schema/stat changes.
User can review and explicitly apply operations in UI.
Applied operations surface validation results and errors.

suggestion.gap: No explicit requirement for operation-type safety between model output and UI mutation layer.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement to enforce typed operation contracts and explicit apply confirmation.
